label: ViuTV productions sweep People's Choice Television Awards as Marf wins Best Actress
label_zh: ViuTV製作橫掃「觀眾選擇電視大獎」，MARF榮獲最佳女主角

timeline.title_zh: 邱彥筒憑實力首奪民間視后殊榮，ViuTV 橫掃十屆大獎多個獎項成演藝界焦點。
timeline.sub_title_zh: 第十屆觀眾在民間電視大獎結果揭曉，Collar 成員 Marf 憑藉出色演繹贏得民心，ViuTV 囊括最佳劇集等多個獎項，展現強大粉絲號召力。
timeline.summary_zh:
隨著第十屆「觀眾在民間電視大獎」結果正式出爐，香港演藝圈在過去二十四小時內持續討論這份由全港網民票選的成績單。這項由民間發起、強調百分之百公眾投票的獎項，今年迎來了十週年里程碑，其結果不僅反映了本地觀眾的喜好，更成為衡量藝人網絡人氣與演技受眾認可度的重要指標。在本屆盛事中，女團 COLLAR 成員 Marf（邱彥筒）憑藉其在原創劇集中的細膩表現，成功擊敗多位資深前輩，首度封為「民間視后」，引發各界熱議。

Marf 的勝出被視為香港新生代藝人轉型成功的典型案例。她在獲獎後的社交媒體感言中提到，從歌手跨界到演員的過程充滿挑戰，尤其是在處理角色複雜情感時，需要徹底打破偶像包袱。業界評論指出，她在獲獎作品中展現出的層次感與爆發力，不僅贏得了核心粉絲的支持，更獲得了普羅大眾對於其演技實力的「蓋章」認可。今日不少演藝評論家在專欄中分析，Marf 的奪獎標誌著新一代演員已正式接棒，成為推動本地影視發展的核心力量。

在整體獲獎分布方面，ViuTV 再次展現了其在數碼媒體時代的壟斷式影響力。除了視后寶座外，該台更橫掃了「民選最佳劇集」、「民選最佳攝影」以及多個男主角與男配角獎項。特別是其年度重頭劇集，憑藉大膽創新的題材與高質感的鏡頭語言，獲得了壓倒性的選票。這反映出在民選機制下，觀眾對於突破傳統框架、勇於嘗試新類型的製作團隊給予了高度肯定，也凸顯了 ViuTV 在品牌經營與年輕族群連結上的成功。

此外，本屆大獎的投票人數再創新高，顯示出香港觀眾對於「參與式獎項」的熱情日益增加。雖然市場上偶有關於「粉絲投票戰」的質疑聲浪，但從今年的獲獎名單觀察，除了高人氣偶像外，不少長期默默耕耘的實力派幕後團隊同樣獲得表揚。這種由下而上的獎項機制，在某種程度上彌補了傳統頒獎禮可能存在的審美偏好，讓更多元化的作品與藝人能夠走入大眾視野。

展望 2026 年，這次「橫掃式」的賽果無疑為本地電視業界注入了一劑強心針。Marf 的封后不僅是個人榮譽，更預示著 ViuTV 在未來一年的製作方向將更加專注於發掘潛力新人與探索具實驗性質的劇本。未來數日，預計將有更多關於獲獎作品的慶功活動與幕後專訪陸續釋出，持續推高這股由民間主導的電視文化熱潮。

timeline.title: ViuTV Dominates 10th People’s Choice Television Awards as Marf Yau Secures Best Actress Honors
timeline.title_zh: ViuTV 勇奪第十屆觀眾選擇電視大獎，蕭欣瑤榮獲最佳女主角殊榮
timeline.sub_title: Following a record-breaking night for the broadcaster, industry analysts and fans celebrate ViuTV’s clean sweep of major categories, highlighted by Marf Yau’s first Best Actress win.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 繼電視台創紀錄之夜後，業內分析師和粉絲們慶祝 ViuTV 橫掃各大獎項，其中最引人注目的是蕭欣瑤首次贏得最佳女主角獎。
timeline.summary:
The aftermath of the 10th People's Choice Television Awards has dominated Hong Kong’s entertainment discourse over the past 24 hours, following a historic night where ViuTV productions secured nearly every major category. The results, officially finalized and disseminated across social media platforms late on March 15, have sparked a wave of celebrations from fans and congratulatory messages from industry peers throughout March 16 and 17. Analysts are pointing to the ceremony as a definitive indicator of the shifting landscape in local television, where fan engagement and digital-first content continue to propel ViuTV ahead of traditional competitors.

Marf Yau, a member of the popular girl group COLLAR, has emerged as the centerpiece of this year's awards. Her win for Best Actress marks a significant milestone in her career, transitioning from a reality competition standout to a critically recognized lead performer. In her reaction shared with fans yesterday, Yau expressed profound gratitude for the support of her production team and the audience, noting that the fan-voted nature of the award made the recognition particularly meaningful. Her performance in the recent youth drama 'Blossoms Somewhere' was cited by voters as a transformative role that showcased her range and emotional depth.

Beyond the individual acting categories, ViuTV's dominance was comprehensive. The broadcaster took home the trophies for Best Drama, Best Variety Show, and Best Theme Song, effectively sweeping the top-tier honors. The 'Best Actor' category saw another victory for a MIRROR member, continuing the boy band's multi-year streak of influencing the awards through a massive and dedicated voting base. This collective success has led to widespread discussion regarding the 'ViuTV effect' on the industry, with critics noting that the channel has successfully cultivated a loyal demographic that values experimental storytelling and idol-driven narratives.

Industry observers have also noted the significance of this being the 10th anniversary of the People's Choice Television Awards. The event has evolved from a niche social media poll into a major cultural benchmark that rival broadcasters and talent agencies monitor closely. The sheer volume of votes recorded this year—reportedly breaking previous participation records—suggests that the audience’s appetite for interactive and transparent award formats is at an all-time high. As the winners begin their victory laps through various media appearances today, the focus has already shifted to ViuTV’s upcoming production slate, with expectations for the network to maintain its momentum through the remainder of the 2026 broadcast season.
timeline.summary_zh:
第十屆觀眾選擇電視大獎的餘波在過去24小時主導了香港娛樂界的討論，此前一個歷史性的夜晚，ViuTV 的作品幾乎贏得了所有主要獎項。結果於3月15日晚間正式確定並在社交媒體平台上發佈，引發了粉絲們的熱烈慶祝和業界同行的祝賀。分析人士指出，本次頒獎典禮是本地電視格局轉變的明確指標，粉絲參與和數字優先內容持續推動 ViuTV 超越傳統競爭對手。

人氣女子組合 COLLAR 成員蕭欣瑤已成為今年頒獎典禮的焦點。她贏得最佳女主角獎是她職業生涯中的一個重要里程碑，標誌著她從選秀節目脫穎而出，成為備受讚譽的領銜演員。在昨天與粉絲分享的回應中，蕭欣瑤對製作團隊和觀眾的支持表示了由衷的感謝，並指出該獎項的粉絲投票性質使這一認可尤為有意義。她在近期青春劇《 somewhere Somewhere》中的表演被選民認為是一個展現她演技廣度和情感深度的轉型角色。

除了個人演技獎項外，ViuTV 的影響力是全面的。該電視台還贏得了最佳劇集、最佳綜藝節目和最佳主題曲獎，有效地橫掃了頂級榮譽。「最佳男主角」類別再次由 MIRROR 成員獲得，延續了該男子組合通過龐大且忠實的投票基礎影響頒獎典禮多年的趨勢。這種集體成功引發了對「ViuTV效應」的廣泛討論，評論家指出該頻道成功培養了一個重視實驗性敘事和偶像驅動敘事的忠實觀眾群。

業界觀察家還指出，這是觀眾選擇電視大獎舉辦十週年。該活動已從一個小眾的社交媒體投票發展成為一個主要的文化標誌，競爭對手電視台和經紀公司密切關注。據報導，今年的投票量打破了以往的參與記錄，這表明觀眾對互動式和透明的頒獎形式的需求達到了前所未有的高峰。隨著獲獎者今天通過各種媒體露面開始他們的勝利巡迴，焦點已轉移到 ViuTV 即將推出的製作計劃上，預計該電視台將在2026年廣播季的剩餘時間裡保持其勢頭。

timeline.title: ViuTV Productions Sweep 10th People's Choice Television Awards as Marf Yau Wins Best Actress
timeline.title_zh: ViuTV 劇集橫掃第10屆人民選擇電視大獎，郭嘉欣勇奪視后
timeline.sub_title: The fan-voted ceremony saw the acclaimed drama The Wine Storer dominate major categories while COLLAR's Marf Yau delivered a major upset by defeating veteran star Charmaine Sheh.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 觀眾投票產生的頒獎典禮上，備受讚譽的劇集《瑪嘉烈與大衛》囊括多個主要獎項，而COLLAR成員Marf Yau（郭嘉欣）爆冷擊敗資深演員佘詩曼，贏得視后殊榮。
timeline.summary:
The results of the 10th People's Choice Television Awards have been officially announced, marking a significant milestone for Hong Kong’s television landscape. ViuTV productions emerged as the night's dominant force, capturing the majority of the major accolades and securing over 80% of the top-five positions across all categories. This year’s ceremony, which is uniquely determined by 100% public voting, highlighted a shifting preference among local audiences toward contemporary storytelling and experimental production values.

In the night's most talked-about development, Marf Yau, a member of the girl group COLLAR, was crowned Best Actress for her lead role in the drama The Day We Become Famous. Her victory [ref:1] is being characterized as a major upset, as she successfully defeated industry veteran Charmaine Sheh, who was nominated for her performance in the high-profile TVB sequel The Queen of News 2. Yau’s [ref:2] portrayal of Chin Hiu-tung resonated deeply with the voting public, signaling her successful transition from a pop idol to a credible acting talent. This win marks her first major acting award since her debut and cements her status as a rising star in the industry.

Meanwhile, the drama series The Wine Storer (also known as The Sommelier) was the most decorated production of the evening, walking away with six awards in total. The series, which has been praised by netizens for its Netflix-level production quality, won the prestigious Best Drama award. MIRROR leader [ref:2] Lokman Yeung took home the Best Actor trophy for his nuanced performance as Tse Tin-hang, a resident singer with a tragic past. The series also secured awards for Best Script and Best Cinematography, reflecting the high technical standards that set it apart during the voting period.

Supporting categories also saw notable successes for ViuTV. Alton Wong achieved a rare feat by winning Best Supporting Actor for the second consecutive year, this time for his role in Marital Mami. Shirley Hsu was awarded Best Supporting Actress for her performance in The Wine Storer, winning a highly competitive race. Interestingly, the category featured a unique situation where veteran actress Gung Chi-en competed against herself with two different roles; while her combined vote count exceeded Hsu’s, the split in her support allowed the ViuTV star to clinch the title.

The results underscore a widening gap in the popular appeal of the two major broadcasters. TVB productions managed to secure only about 17% of the top-five placements, with its flagship programs like The Queen of News 2 and Big Tower Power falling short of the top prizes. As the People's Choice Television Awards celebrate a decade of fan engagement, the dominance of ViuTV and the rise of young talents like Marf Yau suggest a transformative era for Hong Kong television, where audience-driven recognition increasingly challenges traditional industry hierarchies.
timeline.summary_zh:
第10屆人民選擇電視大獎結果正式公佈，標誌著香港電視界的一個重要里程碑。ViuTV的製作成為當晚的主導力量，贏得了大部分主要獎項，並在所有獎項的前五名中佔據超過80%的席位。今年的頒獎典禮完全由公眾投票決定，突顯了本地觀眾對當代敘事和實驗性製作價值的轉變。

當晚最受矚目的發展是，女子組合COLLAR成員郭嘉欣（Marf Yau）憑藉在劇集《 beauty and the beast》中的主角演出，勇奪最佳女主角獎。她的勝利被形容為一次重大爆冷，她成功擊敗了資深演員佘詩曼，後者憑藉在高關注度的TVB劇集《新聞女王2》中的表現獲得提名。郭嘉欣對陳曉彤（Chin Hiu-tung）的演繹深深 resonated於投票公眾，標誌著她成功從流行偶像轉型為備受認可的演技派。這是她出道以來首個重要演技獎項，鞏固了她作為一顆冉冉升起的新星的地位。[ref:1, 2]

同時，劇集《 the sommelier》（又名《 the wine storer》）成為當晚獲獎最多的製作，共贏得六個獎項。該劇因其被網民讚譽的Netflix級製作質素，贏得了備受推崇的最佳劇集獎。MIRROR隊長楊樂文（Lokman Yeung）憑藉其飾演一位有悲慘過去的駐唱歌手謝天行（Tse Tin-hang）的細膩演出，摘得最佳男主角獎。該劇還贏得了最佳劇本和最佳攝影獎，反映了其在投票期間展現的高技術標準。[ref:2]

配角獎項方面，ViuTV亦有顯著斬獲。王智騫（Alton Wong）憑藉在《 敗者食塵》中的演出，連續第二年贏得最佳男配角獎，創下了難得的成就。許軼（Shirley Hsu）憑藉在《 the wine storer》中的演出，贏得最佳女配角獎，競爭異常激烈。有趣的是，該獎項出現了一個獨特情況，資深演員鮑起靜（Gung Chi-en）以兩個不同角色與自己競爭；儘管她的總票數超過了許軼，但支持票的分散讓這位ViuTV的明星得以勝出。

結果突顯了兩大電視台在受歡迎程度上的差距日益擴大。TVB的製作僅佔前五名中的約17%，其旗艦節目如《新聞女王2》和《 萬千星輝頒獎典禮》等未能贏得頭獎。隨著人民選擇電視大獎慶祝十年來的觀眾參與，ViuTV的統治地位以及郭嘉欣等年輕人才的崛起，預示著香港電視界正在進入一個轉型時代，觀眾的認可日益挑戰著傳統的行業階層。
